mapper.select: SELECT ID, NODE_NAME, LOOP_BACK_ADDR, MGMT_ADDR FROM IP_SDN.TB_NODE
SELECT ID, IF_NAME, NODE_ID, IP_ADDR, HW_IF_ID FROM IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE
SELECT ID as Id, SIF_ID, RIF_ID, OSPF_METRIC, USAGED FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK

SELECT N.ID AS SDN_NODE_ID , NM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID, NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM , I.ID AS SDN_IF_ID, I.IF_NAME AS STRIFNM , PM.IF_NUM AS STRIFID , LT.TX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSOUT, LT.RX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSIN, LT.TX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSOUT, LT.RX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSIN , UO.NREN_ID, UO.NREN_NAME, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME, LT.ID FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON LT.IF_ID = I.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME) INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON I.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON UO.NODE_ID = NM.NODE_ID AND UO.IF_ID = PM.IF_ID WHERE PM.NODE_NUM = NM.NODE_NUM AND LT.ID > #{dataKey} ORDER BY LT.ID

SELECT OE.NREN_ID ,OE.NREN_NAME, OE.SDN_NODE_ID, OE.SDN_IF_ID , OE.STRRESID, OE.STRRESNM, OE.STRIFID, OE.STRIFNM , COALESCE(LT.TX_BIT_RATE,0) AS FLTBPSOUT , COALESCE(LT.RX_BIT_RATE, 0) AS FLTBPSIN , COALESCE(LT.TX_PKT_RATE, 0) AS FLTPPSOUT , COALESCE(LT.RX_PKT_RATE, 0) AS FLTPPSIN , LT.MEASURED_DATETIME , COALESCE(LT.ID,0) AS ID FROM ( SELECT UO.NREN_IDE, nm.node_id,pm.if_id, N.ID AS SDN_NODE_ID, NM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID,NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM, I.ID AS SDN_IF_ID,I.IF_NAME AS STRIFNM, PM.IF_NU,UO.NREN_NAMM AS STRIFID FROM RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.if_id = UO.IF_ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON NM.NODE_ID = UO.NODE_ID and PM.NODE_NUM = NM.NODE_NUM INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME) INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON I.NODE_ID = N.ID AND N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT ) OE INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT ON LT.IF_ID = OE.SDN_IF_ID AND LT.ID > #{datakey} ORDER BY CASE WHEN ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 end, LT DESC; /* 250410 고성호 LEFT OUTER JOIN => INNER JOIN으로 변경 [논의 사항] - TB_LINK_TRAFFIC을 우선으로 할지 TB_USER_ORGAN을 우선으로 할지 > TB_USER_ORGAN을 우선으로 하는 것 유지 => 이유 : USER_ORGAN으로 관리하지 않는 Traffic은 출력안하는 것으로 결정 - LEFT OUTER JOIN을 INNER JOIN으로 변경 > INNER JOIN으로 변경하게 되면 TB_LINK_TRAFFIC이 없으면 데이터가 0개로 출력되므로 다음 Time에 처리됨 > 현 상황에서 TB_LINK_TRAFFIC에 없는 TB_USER_ORGAN 정보는 다음에 보내는것으로 결정 */

SELECT N.ID AS SDN_NODE_ID , NM.NODE_NUM as STRRESID , NM.NODE_NM as STRRESNM , NF.CPU_USAGE as CpuUsage , NF.MEM_USAGE as MemUsage,NF.MEASURED_DATETIME as measured_datetime, NF.ID FROM IP_SDN.TB_NODEFACTOR NF INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON NF.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT WHERE NF.ID > #{dataKey} ORDER BY NF.ID

SELECT COLLECT_SEQ as collectSeq, COLLECT_HOST as collectHost, SOURCE, APPNAME, HOSTNAME, FACILITY_CODE as facilityCode, FACILITY, SEVERITY_CODE as severityCode, SEVERITY, SYSLOG_MESSAGE as syslogMessage, SYSLOG_PROCID as syslogProcid, COLLECT_TIMESTAMP as collectTimestamp FROM GATHER.TB_SYSLOG_COLLECT WHERE COLLECT_SEQ > #{collectSeq} AND COLLECT_TIMESTAMP > rca.fc_get_minus_time(1) ORDER BY COLLECT_SEQ

SELECT COLLECT_SEQ as collectSeq, COLLECT_HOST as strresname, AGENT_ADDRESS as strresip, ETHER_TYPE as etherType, HEADER_PROTOCOL as headerProtocol, INPUT_IFINDEX as inputIfindex, OUTPUT_IFINDEX as outputIfindex, SAMPLE_DIRECTION as sampleDirection, SRC_IP as strsIp, SRC_MAC as strsMac, SRC_PORT as strsPort, SOURCE_ID_TYPE as sourceIdType, SOURCE_ID_INDEX as sourceIdIndex, DST_IP as strdIp, DST_MAC as strdMac, DST_PORT as strdPort, PACKET_BYTES as packetBytes, PACKET_DROPS as packetDrops, FRAME_LENGTH as frameLength, HEADER_LENGTH as headerLength, IP_DSCP as ipDscp, IP_ECN as ipEcn, IP_FLAGS as ipFlags, IP_FRAGMENT_OFFSET as ipFragmentOffset, IP_TOTAL_LENGTH as ipTotalLength, IP_TTL as ipTtl, SAMPLING_RATE as samplingRate, TCP_HEADER_LENGTH as tcpHeaderLength, TCP_URGENT_POINTER as tcpUrgentPointer, TCP_WINDOW_SIZE as tcpWindowSize, COLLECT_TIMESTAMP as dateregdate FROM GATHER.TB_SFLOW_COLLECT WHERE COLLECT_SEQ > #{collectSeq} AND COLLECT_TIMESTAMP > rca.fc_get_minus_time(1) ORDER BY COLLECT_SEQ
SELECT ALARMNO, ALARMTIME, NODE_NUM , NODE_NM, ALARMMSG, ALARMLVL, ETC, RULE_ID FROM RCA.TB_SYSLOG_ALARM_MST WHERE ALARMNO::INTEGER > #{dataKey} ORDER BY ALARMNO
